mapper.select: SELECT status FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT status FROM documents WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_status_history (file_id, from_status, to_status, changed_by, reason, changed_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{changedBy}, #{reason}, #{changedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT from_status AS fromStatus, to_status AS toStatus, changed_by AS changedBy, reason, changed_at AS changedAt FROM document_status_history WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY changed_at DESC, id DESC
